title: KBTV-009 The clothes look neat and stiff, but is it easy for a dirty woman to get rid of her shoes? Theory
description: Women's college students who go to college have the image that their clothes are neat and tidy, but the real ladies are neat and clean even their shoes. However, a neat and clean Yariman woman does not pay attention to her shoes. So this time, I picked up A-chan, an active female college student who found dirty shoes in the city, and verified whether she could easily open her crotch! How is the result!
